competitions.title: India Ready for Worlds 2026
competitions.summary: India 2026 Preparations Underway An official WAF inspection visit was carried out in India as part of preparations for the World Armwrestling & Para Armwrestling Championships 2026. The most important meetings included discussions with Devendra Fadnavis, Chief Minister of Maharashtra, with the Paralympic Committee of India and the Ambassador of Bulgaria, focusing on support, organization, […]

competitions.title: First Step Completed – Road to Brisbane 2032 Paralympics
competitions.summary: Para Armwrestling Meets IPC Worldwide Reach Requirement for Brisbane 2032 The World Armwrestling Federation (WAF) is pleased to confirm that Para Armwrestling has met the worldwide reach requirement for inclusion in the Brisbane 2032 Paralympic Games, following official confirmation from the International Paralympic Committee. After submitting additional data, WAF received confirmation that Para Armwrestling now […]

competitions.title: Register with WAF
competitions.summary: WAF Registration WAF invites WAF members, WAF Continental members, and any armwrestling organizations that represent armwrestling in their country and believe in the WAF core values: Clean Sport, integrity, transparency, respect, and fair play, to register or update their details if already registered. Registered organizations will be contacted by WAF for guidance, support, and future […]

competitions.title: Dubai 2025 Asian Youth Para Games
competitions.summary: Para Armwrestling Debuts at Dubai 2025 Asian Youth Para Games The Para Armwrestling competition at the Asian Youth Para Games Dubai 2025 was held on 11 December 2025, marking a historic milestone for the sport. This event represents the first official inclusion of para armwrestling in the Asian Youth Para Games, organized in cooperation with […]
